title: Hollowtown
content:

{{Quote|We might as well start out with Hollowtown. It's what everyone always wants to see first.|Jenica Sonsen, showing Luke Skywalker and several others around Centerpoint Station|<ref name="SAC" />}}
'''Hollowtown''' was a large botanic biosphere located in [[Centerpoint Station]].

==Structure and appearance==
{{Quote|It was beautiful to see. The Glowpoint would shine down constantly. The farmers would use shadow-shields to block the light and simulate seasons. From the inside of the shields, it could be as light or as dark as you liked, just by twisting a dial. From the outside, the shield could look like shadows, or like silver bubbles, or squares of gold—however you wanted to set them. People decorated their shields all sorts of ways. There was a special feeling, knowing it was always day here—but that under every spot of gold was a secret little patch of night.|Jenica Sonsen|<ref name="SAC" />}}
Hollowtown was an open sphere, measuring sixty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] in diameter. It was located in Centerpoint Station's [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] [[Tractor beam projector/Legends|projector]], in the exact center of the station. At the center of Hollowtown, the tractor beam projector's power source, the [[Glowpoint]], blazed like a perpetual sun, making the interior of the sphere habitable.<ref name="SAC" />

The walls of Hollowtown had been colonized for generations, with homes, parks, lakes, orchards, and farmland. Because of the Glowpoint's light, there was no night in Hollowtown. Residents typically placed programmed blocks of [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] above their houses that "dimmed" on a day/night cycle. These were referred to as "shadow-shields" and were decorated extensively by its owner. On both sides of the Hollowtown sphere, positioned along the spin axis, was a large cone ringed by six smaller cones; the sets were called the [[North Conical Mountains|North]] and [[South Conical Mountains]]. These cones were part of the tractor beam projector's mechanisms.<ref name="SAC" /> One of the southern cones was known as [[Conical Six]], and was owned by the [[Five Brothers Resort and Casino]].<ref name="SoF" />

==History==
===Creation and settlement===
{{Quote|Hollowtown used to be quite a lovely place. It grew enough food for the whole station, with a surplus. It had parks, and nice homes, and lakes and streams. Green and blue, cool and lovely.|Jenica Sonsen|<ref name="SAC" />}}
The chamber, along with the station itself had been created out of material mined from asteroids around [[100,000 BBY/Legends|100,000 BBY]] by the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]], under order from the [[Celestial/Legends|Celestials]].<ref name="FotJ: Apocalypse">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]''</ref> The chamber's tractor beam was then used to build the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] by pulling [[Planet/Legends|planets]] into orbit around the star [[Corell/Legends|Corell]],<ref name="CatCW" /> and [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]] black hole cluster, in order to keep in a powerful being known as [[Abeloth]].<ref name="FotJ: Apocalypse">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]''</ref>

After the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] collapsed and slaves in the Corellian System revolted, freeing themselves in [[25,200 BBY]], they began to colonize Centerpoint Station.<ref name="NEC" /> None of the colonists knew who built Centerpoint Station or whether the structure was intended to be inhabited, but they found that the Glowpoint in the tractor beam projector's chamber provided an environment as acceptable as any fertile planet, so some settled into the chamber and created Hollowtown. For generations, the farms in Hollowtown provided more than enough food for the station and the settlers lived comfortably under the Glowpoint.<ref name="SAC" />

===Destruction===
{{Quote|I believe what Administrative Officer Sonsen means is that Centerpoint's Chief Executive ordered a full evacuation after the first flare disaster, and the entire Executive Secretariat left along with most of the civilian populace.|C-3PO|<ref name="SAC" />}}
In [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], the [[Sacorrian Triad]], the leaders of the planet [[Sacorria]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], wished to break the sector away from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and create an independent state.<ref name="SAC" /> Their scientists studied Centerpoint Station for a long time and discovered its powerful tractor beam. They found that it was able to destroy entire stars when they tested it on [[TD-10036-EM-1271]], a star in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], and saw [[Destruction of TD-10036-EM-1271|that it had exploded]]. The Triad then decided to use the threat of the station's destructive powers to negotiate their independence.<ref name="AAC">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref>

[[File:Hollowtown.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The destruction of Hollowtown during the Corellian Crisis.]]
When the tractor beam fired, it caused the Glowpoint to flare to several thousand degrees. Everyone present in Hollowtown was killed as the structures and farms were incinerated and the water evaporated. The fires used up the majority of the oxygen in the chamber, so Centerpoint Station's technicians were required to install a full air system in the [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] car that led to the chamber. As a result of Hollowtown's destruction, the station's population left. The government of the nearby double worlds, [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] worked to keep it quiet, believing it to be a terrorist attack.<ref name="SAC" />

Shortly after, the Sacorrian Triad launched their [[Corellian Crisis|insurrection]], during which they fired the tractor beam several more times, [[Destruction of Thanta Zilbra|destroying]] the star [[Thanta Zilbra (star)|Thanta Zilbra]] and nearly destroying the star [[Bovo Yagen (star)|Bovo Yagen]].<ref name="SAC" />

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the remains of Hollowtown were destroyed when Centerpoint Station fired on itself during the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]] in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="LotF: Fury" />

==Appearances==
